query: INSERT INTO manifestations (work_id, format, file_path, ingestion_file_hash, current_file_hash, file_size_bytes, ingestion_status, validation_status, enrichment_status, enrichment_attempt_count, enrichment_attempted_at) VALUES ($1, 'epub'::manifestation_format, $2, $3, $3, 1000, 'complete'::ingestion_status, 'valid'::validation_status, ($4::text)::enrichment_status, $5, CASE WHEN $6::bigint IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE now() - ($6 || ' seconds')::interval END) RETURNING id
